title: OpenAI Codex App Improved Computer Use Startup And Plugin Config Writes
summary: OpenAI's Codex app 26.602 changelog records profile activity insights/share cards, Computer Use startup readiness and appshot error-reporting improvements, browser/review UI fixes, expanded onboarding role choices, and a fix for configuration writes after plugin installation.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Re-test Computer Use startup, appshot diagnostics, browser/review UI paths, and plugin installation config writes before attributing failures to local setup.
Update onboarding and profile/usage documentation if team guidance references the pre-26.602 Codex app surfaces.

detail.change_summary: Codex app 26.602 changed workflow quality and onboarding behavior around Computer Use readiness, appshot reporting, plugin config writes, review/browser UI, and profile usage surfaces.

limitations: This event records app workflow and reliability changes, not a provider status incident or API-level outage.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
